curation_notes: Patch modifies only htdocs/libraries/icms/ipf/Controller.php, adding preg_replace sanitization for directory traversal sequences in the postDataToObject method for XOBJ_DTYPE_IMAGE and XOBJ_DTYPE_FILE cases. Pre-assigned class path-traversal confirmed: CWE-22 maps directly, advisory explicitly describes directory traversal, and the fix strips ../ sequences from user-supplied file names. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern — other files in the ipf directory serve different roles (Handler, Object, Tree, etc.).
